---
title: "Herpor's Website"
toc: false
---

::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="40%"}
![Profile](media/photo2.jpg){style="width:350px; border-radius:48%;"}
:::

::: {.column width="60%"}

### Full Name  
Herpor Poryaeproua 

### Education
UWC Mahindra College, India, 2023  
St. Olaf College, United States, 2027  

### Majors and Concentrations
Biology (Major)  
Statistics and Data Science  
Environmental Studies  

### Skills  
Data and Statistical: Data analysis, text mining, web scraping, application programming interface (API)  
Software: Intermediate proficiency in R; basic proficiency in Python  
Languages: Hmong, Lao, and English (fluency written/spoken); Thai (basic written and conversational spoken)  


### Contact Information 
Phone: 507-321-0354  
Email: poryae1@stolaf.edu  
Linkedin: herpor  
Handshake: herpor  

### Link to Github
[R code in github](https://github.com/herporp88/herpor88.github.io)

:::

:::
